phases.name: Vite 7 to 8 (Rolldown) — entry-gated
phases.gate: D16 2-core docker build PASS (11s); INV3b preserved; INV5 6229 pass; preview smoke ok

phases.name: vp migrate — conditional on Phase 3
phases.reason: vite-plus 0.2.2 migrate requires Yarn Berry (catalog: protocol, .yarnrc.yml, Berry lockfile v10) — a full Yarn Classic v1 -> Berry migration incompatible with the repo's yarn-v1 + --frozen-lockfile CI. Also breaks @tailwindcss/vite peer (catalog aliases vite->vite-plus-core@0.2.2). D17 already flagged low value for a single-package repo. Reverted to clean Phase 3; treat yarn v1 -> Berry as a separate deliberate decision if ever wanted (would also cleanly solve the musl-trim via Berry supportedArchitectures).
